scripts.build: npx esbuild background/service-worker.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/service-worker.js --platform=browser --target=chrome120 && npx esbuild content/luma.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/luma.js --platform=browser --target=chrome120 && npx esbuild content/linkedin.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/linkedin.js --platform=browser --target=chrome120 && npx esbuild content/login-bridge.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/login-bridge.js --platform=browser --target=chrome120 && npx esbuild sidepanel/sidepanel.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/sidepanel.js --platform=browser --target=chrome120 && cp sidepanel/sidepanel.css dist/sidepanel.css
